currency_counter enable: tracks how many of each currency you use during a session
It tracks right/left clicks on currency and items to count how many you use
It accepts custom entries as well
It also allows you to set manual prices for currencies and items, and calculates the total value of your used currency based on that
currency_counter ssf: solo self-found mode: hides the price and total columns
also changes the default number of visible session tabs to 2
currency_counter max rows: the maximum number of currencies that are displayed
currency_counter font-size: – and + can be held down, the middle button resets the size
currency_counter spacing: pixel gap between session tabs in the bar
– and + can be held down, the middle button resets the size
currency_counter visible sessions: how many session tabs are shown at once in the bar
scroll the mouse wheel over the tabs to cycle through the rest
default is 2 in ssf mode, 4 otherwise
– and + can be held down, the middle button resets the size
currency_counter ninja stale: how many hours must pass without a manual price update before poe.ninja prices are used as a fallback
orange price = sourced from poe.ninja; brown total = ninja-sourced item total
currency_counter ninja: uses poe.ninja prices as a fallback when a currency has no manual price, or its price is older than the staleness threshold
orange price = poe.ninja source; brown total = ninja-sourced item total
requires the stash-ninja feature to be enabled(/highlight)
currency_counter price warn: after this many hours, a manually-entered price starts turning yellow as a warning
must be lower than the stale threshold
click the value to reset to the default (3h)
currency_counter price stale: after this many hours, a manually-entered price turns red — considered too old to be reliable
must be higher than the warning threshold
click the value to reset to the default (6h)
currency_counter rate warn: after this many hours, the chaos/exalt exchange ratio starts turning yellow as a warning
exchange rates tend to be more stable than prices, so this can usually be set higher
click the value to reset to the default (3h)
currency_counter rate stale: after this many hours, the exchange rate turns red — considered too old to trust for conversions
click the value to reset to the default (6h)

add session: scroll the mouse wheel over the session tabs to cycle through them when more tabs exist than the visible limit
del btn: click once to be asked for confirmation, then click again within 3 seconds to confirm
cannot delete the last remaining session
accept btn: saves the session name typed in the edit field to the left
ninja fetch: manually triggers a poe.ninja price fetch for all tracked stash tabs
tabs that were fetched recently (within ~1 hour) are skipped automatically
prices show in orange when sourced from poe.ninja; totals show in yellow when at least one item uses a ninja price
ratio chaos: click to set the chaos → divine exchange rate
enter the value as a decimal (e.g. 200) or a fraction (e.g. 200/1)
the rate is used to convert prices and totals into your chosen display currency
ratio exalt: click to set the exalt → divine exchange rate
enter the value as a decimal or a fraction (e.g. 150/1)
the rate is used to convert prices and totals into your chosen display currency
add currency: adds the text in the search box as a new custom currency entry with a count of 1
click once to be asked for confirmation, then click again within 3 seconds to confirm
if the currency already exists but has a count of 0, it is reset to 1 instead
filter reset: clears the search filter and shows all tracked currencies
